name: business-pl
description: Businesspowers Poland — Codex support for Polish JDG and individual-tax workflows. Codex plugin ID: business-pl. Claude Code keeps the pl plugin ID.

interface.shortDescription: Polish JDG and individual tax workflows
interface.longDescription: Businesspowers Poland provides skills and agent prompts for JDG registration, tax-form selection, PIT, ZUS, health contribution, VAT, reporting, closure, PIT-38 investments, invoices, KSeF, bank statements, and JPK_V7 reconciliation. Codex plugin ID: business-pl; Claude Code keeps pl.
defaultPrompt: Help me compare Polish JDG tax forms.
Calculate JDG PIT, ZUS, and VAT.
